assertions.title: Evaluator adapter captures actionable side information

steps.expected: side_info has 'traces' key with list value
side_info has 'errors' key with error info for failed tasks
steps.observed: PASSED — errors extracted from transcript and error_category
PASSED — duration from telemetry latency.total_s, overridden by wall-clock

steps.expected: side_info has 'token_usage' with prompt, completion, total keys
steps.observed: PASSED — token_usage dict with all 3 fields
PASSED — all fields correct for timeout
PASSED — tool call metrics extracted correctly
PASSED — RuntimeError captured with 'Docker not available' in errors

evidence.sourceVerified: evaluator_adapter.py _build_side_info() builds all fields: task_id, status, score, difficulty, error_category, errors, traces, duration_s, token_usage, tool_calls, raw_events

assertions.title: Side information is passed to the reflection model

steps.action: Verify side_info has difficulty field for reflection context (test_side_info_has_difficulty)
Verify side_info forwards error messages for reflection (test_side_info_forwards_error_messages)
steps.expected: errors list with error_category correlating with failures
steps.observed: PASSED — error_category='TEST_FAILURE' and errors extracted from transcript

steps.action: Verify side_info forwards trace events when enabled (test_side_info_forwards_trace_events)

evidence.sourceVerified: evaluator_adapter.py _build_side_info() includes difficulty, errors (from _extract_errors), and raw_events (from _extract_raw_events when trace_enabled=True). Side info dict is the second element of the return tuple, directly available to GEPA reflection model.

steps.expected: cheap success > expensive success, failure=0.0, deterministic
hard > easy weight, all-pass=1.0, none-pass=0.0, deterministic

steps.action: Verify objective factory creates correct types (4 tests)
steps.expected: create() returns correct subclass, raises on unknown, distinct scores
steps.observed: PASSED — factory works, invalid name raises ValueError, distinct scores confirmed

steps.action: Verify objectives produce distinct scores for same results (test_objectives_produce_distinct_scores)
steps.observed: PASSED — cost-adjusted differs from pass-rate due to cost penalty

steps.expected: 5 runs produce same score for each objective
pass-rate, cost-adjusted, difficulty-weighted all work through adapter
steps.observed: PASSED — all 3 adapter objective tests pass

evidence.sourceVerified: evaluator_adapter.py defines PassRateObjective, CostAdjustedObjective, DifficultyWeightedObjective (all extending ObjectiveFunction). ObjectiveFunction.create() factory maps names to classes. GepaEvaluatorAdapter.__call__() computes score via _objective_function.compute().

steps.expected: Custom eval function is wrapped and callable

steps.action: Verify custom evaluator is called correctly (test_custom_evaluator_called)
steps.expected: Custom function receives candidate+example, returns score+side_info
steps.observed: PASSED — custom eval called once, returns (0.75, {custom: True})

steps.action: Verify factory creates adapter from config (test_create_evaluator_adapter_factory)
Verify factory passes custom objective params (test_create_evaluator_adapter_custom_objective_params)

evidence.sourceVerified: evaluator_adapter.py provides load_custom_evaluator() which wraps any callable conforming to the GEPA evaluator protocol. It validates return types, ensures task_id in side_info, and adds logging. create_evaluator_adapter() factory creates GepaEvaluatorAdapter from config. EvaluatorAdapterConfig supports custom objective params.

summary: Tested 4 assertions (VAL-GEPA-01, VAL-GEPA-02, VAL-GEPA-03, VAL-GEPA-06) using 48 pytest unit tests in tests/test_gepa_adapter.py. All 48 tests passed in 0.13s. All assertions PASS: side_info captures all required fields (traces, errors, duration, token_usage), side_info is forwarded for reflection, multi-objective scoring produces deterministic distinct composite scores, and the evaluator adapter is pluggable via load_custom_evaluator and create_evaluator_adapter factory.
